title: Update Metrics Page Title to H5 and Fix Add Metrics Tooltip
story: As a DataTools Pro user, I want the metrics page title to use proper heading formatting and an accurate tooltip for Add Metrics, so that the UI is consistent and informative.
description:
Two minor UX changes to the Metrics page:

1. Change the page title to use an `<h5>` tag
2. Update the "Add Metrics" tooltip text to: `Enter your metric name into the text box and press "Enter" or click "Add Metric" button. Manage and associate metrics with dashboards and reports.`
acceptance_criteria: Metrics page title uses h5 heading tag
Add Metrics tooltip displays the correct instructional text
ux_changes: Changed metrics page title to h5. Updated Add Metrics tooltip with correct instructional text.
comment_summary: Developer implemented the changes and submitted for review.
